what: Honest independence of the 40k forward-predictive commitments. Signatures are real and distinct; predictions are NOT independent — they cluster by a small set of strategies.
headline: 91800 signed commitments across 40000 agents collapse to 9747 distinct prediction vectors (4 strategies); Kish effective n ≈ 3. We publish effective n, not raw agent count.
why: Reward and confidence must scale with effective n, not signature count. 40,000 correlated bets on the same 4 strategies carry roughly the information of a few distinct bets, not 40,000. Correlated-agents inflation is exactly what a one-operator fleet must NOT do.
reads_only: read from _predict_commitments.jsonl; no fleet-state writes (Angeal no-touch).
